briefdescription.para: Enumerations to specify whether we should render to the frame-buffer.
Enumerations to specify whether the depth buffer is available.
Enumerations to specify whether the stencil buffer is available.
Enumerations to specify whether the partial update is available.
Zero means that no additional policy is set.
Whether we should render to the frame-buffer or not.
Whether the depth buffer is available or not.
Whether the stencil buffer is available or not.
Whether the partial update is available or not.

detaileddescription.para:
The additional policy of core update / rendering process.
Policy cannot be changed after the Core initialized.

briefdescription.para: Container of points.
Iterator for Dali::Integration::PointContainer.
Const iterator for Dali::Integration::PointContainer.
Set tag number for given constraint. It should be called only for internal repositories. Have exclusive relation with SetTag().

detaileddescription.para:
Assert if we set internal tags which alread set some custom tag by application.
@SINCE_2_4.14
constraint
The constraint that want to set tag.
tag
The tag number.

briefdescription.para: Removes all the constraint from the Object include custom and internal. It should be called only for internal repositories.
Removes all the constraint from the Object with a matching tag. It should be called only for internal repositories.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_4.14
handle
The handle that want to remove constraint by tag.
tag
The tag of the constraints which will be removed. Only internal tag be allowed.

briefdescription.para: Removes all the constraint from the Object with a range of tags [tagBegin tagEnd). It should be called only for internal repositories.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_4.14
handle
The handle that want to remove constraint by tag.
tagBegin
The begin tag of the constraints which will be removed. Only internal tag be allowed. (include)
tagEnd
The end tag of the constraints which will be removed. Only internal tag be allowed. (exclusived)
Create a new touch data handle from timestamp and touch point.

parameterdescription.para: The time stamp of the touch event.
The point on screen where the touch occurred.

simplesect.para: A new touch data handle.

detaileddescription.para: Create a new touch data handle from timestamp and point.

parameterdescription.para: The time stamp of the touch event.
The point on screen where the touch occurred.

simplesect.para: A new touch data handle.

detaileddescription.para: Create a new hover data handle from timestamp and point.

parameterdescription.para: The time stamp of the hover event.
The point on screen where the hover occurred.

simplesect.para: A new hover data handle.

detaileddescription.para: Create a new hover data handle from timestamp and point.

parameterdescription.para: The time stamp of the hpver event.
The point on screen where the hover occurred.

simplesect.para: A new hover data handle.

briefdescription.para: Called by adaptor to set the pan gesture prediction mode from an environment variable.

simplesect.para: Should be called after Core creation.

briefdescription.para: Called by adaptor to set the prediction amount of the pan gesture from an environment variable.
Sets the upper bound of the prediction amount for clamping from an environment variable.
Sets the lower bound of the prediction amount for clamping from an environment variable.

Sets the prediction amount to adjust when the pan velocity is changed from an environment variable. If the pan velocity is accelerating, the prediction amount will be increased by the specified amount until it reaches the upper bound. If the pan velocity is decelerating, the prediction amount will be decreased by the specified amount until it reaches the lower bound.
Called to set how pan gestures smooth input.
Sets the smoothing amount of the pan gesture.

parameterdescription.para: The smoothing amount [0.0f,1.0f] - 0.0f would be no smoothing, 1.0f maximum smoothing

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to use actual times of the real gesture and frames or not.

parameterdescription.para: True = use actual times, False = use perfect values

briefdescription.para: Sets the interpolation time range (ms) of past points to use (with weights) when interpolating.
Sets whether to use scalar only prediction, which when enabled, ignores acceleration.
Sets whether to use two point prediction. This combines two interpolated points to get more steady acceleration and velocity values.
Sets the time in the past to interpolate the second point when using two point interpolation.
Sets the two point velocity bias. This is the ratio of first and second points to use for velocity.
Sets the two point acceleration bias. This is the ratio of first and second points to use for acceleration.
Sets the range of time (ms) of points in the history to perform multitap smoothing with (if enabled).
Sets the minimum distance required to start a pan gesture.
Sets the minimum number of touch events to start a pan.
Sets the minimum distance required to start a pinch gesture.
Sets the minimum touch events required before a pinch can be started.
Sets the minimum touch events required after a pinch started.
Sets the minimum touch events required before a rotation can be started.
Sets the minimum touch events required after a rotation started.
Sets the minimum holding time required to be recognized as a long press gesture.
Sets the maximum allowed time required to be recognized as a multi tap gesture (millisecond)

detaileddescription.para: This is the maximum allowable time interval to recognize as multi-tap. If taps come in within this time, they are recognized as multi-tap.

simplesect.para: If it's a double tap, it's like this: |(touch down <recognizerTime--> touch up) < wihtin maximumAllowedTime --> (touch down <recognizerTime--> touch up)|

briefdescription.para: Sets the recognizer time required to be recognized as a tap gesture (millisecond)

detaileddescription.para: This time is from touch down to touch up to recognize the tap gesture.

simplesect.para: The tab is like below: touch down <recognizerTime--> touch up If the time between touch down and touch up is longer than recognizer time, it is not recognized as a tap gesture.

briefdescription.para: Sets the recognizer distance required to be recognized as a tap gesture.

detaileddescription.para: This distance is from touch down to touch up to recognize the tap gesture.

simplesect.para: The tab is like below: touch down <distance--> touch up If the distance between touch down and touch up is longer than distance, it is not recognized as a tap gesture. Default value is 20

detaileddescription.para:
Release the buffer from a pixel data object, zero it in the pixel data object.
pixelData
The pixel data object to take the buffer from

Get the buffer from a pixel data object.
pixelData
The pixel data object to get the buffer from
the buffer of pixelData.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *buffer, uint32_t bufferSize, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t strideBytes, Pixel::Format pixelFormat, PixelData::ReleaseFunction releaseFunction)
memberdef.name: NewPixelDataWithReleaseAfterUpload

detaileddescription.para:
Creates a PixelData object which will release the buffer automatically after upload to texture.
The pixel data object.

Get whether we need to release pixel data after texture upload or not.
This function can be called from another thread. Be careful about thread safety.
pixelData
The pixel data object to get the release policy.
True if we need to release pixel data after texture upload. False otherwise.
Called by adaptor to provide profiling information.

simplesect.para: Should be called after Core creation.

parameterdescription.para: The type of profiling information to output.

memberdef.argsstring: (Dali::StringView vertexShader, Dali::StringView fragmentShader, Shader::Hint::Value hints, Dali::StringView shaderName, std::vector< Dali::UniformBlock > uniformBlocks, bool strongConnection=false)
memberdef.name: ShaderNewWithUniformBlock

briefdescription.para: Creates Shader and connect by given uniform blocks.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_4.14
vertexShader
Vertex shader code for the effect.
fragmentShader
Fragment Shader code for the effect.
hints
Hints to define the geometry of the rendered object
shaderName
The name of this shader.
uniformBlocks
Uniform blocks to be connected to shader.
strongConnection
Whether we connect uniform blocks to shader strong or weak.
A handle to a shader effect

memberdef.argsstring: (Dali::Property::Value shaderMap, std::vector< Dali::UniformBlock > uniformBlocks, bool strongConnection=false)
memberdef.name: ShaderNewWithUniformBlock

briefdescription.para: Creates Shader and connect by given uniform blocks.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_4.31
shaderMap
Property::Map of shader data or Property::Array of Property::Map. Property::Map format is {"renderPassTag":"", "vertex":"", "fragment":"", "hints":""} shaderMap can be Property::Array of Property::Map for multi pass shading.
uniformBlocks
Uniform blocks to be connected to shader.
strongConnection
Whether we connect uniform blocks to shader strong or weak.
A handle to a shader effect

briefdescription.para: Generates tag 'legacy-prefix-end' with end position of prefix text to make shader code parsing easier.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_3.43
Generated string with tag.

briefdescription.para: Convert a Dali::String to a std::string by moving.

detaileddescription.para: This moves the string data without copying. The source Dali::String will be left in a valid but empty state. For internal use where the implementation needs to work with std::string efficiently.

simplesect.para: A std::string containing the moved data

briefdescription.para: Convert a Dali::Property::Value to a std::string.

detaileddescription.para: Extracts the string from a Property::Value without copying the Property::Value wrapper itself. The string data is still copied internally (no const-ref getter exists on Property::Value).

parameterdescription.para: The Property::Value (must be of type STRING)

simplesect.para: A std::string containing the same data

briefdescription.para: Extract a std::string from a Property::Value conditionally.

detaileddescription.para: Restores the one-liner if(value.Get(str)) pattern that existed before the Dali::String migration. Returns true if the value was a string and was extracted successfully.

parameterdescription.para: The std::string to write to on success

simplesect.para: true if the value was a string and was extracted

briefdescription.para: Convert a std::string to a Dali::String by moving.

detaileddescription.para: This moves the string data without copying. The source std::string will be left in a valid but empty state.

simplesect.para: A Dali::String containing the moved data

briefdescription.para: Convert a Dali::String to a std::string.

detaileddescription.para: This creates a copy of the string data. For internal use where the implementation needs to work with std::string.

simplesect.para: A std::string containing the same data

briefdescription.para: Convert a Dali::StringView to a std::string.

detaileddescription.para: This creates a copy of the viewed data. For internal use where the implementation needs to work with std::string.

simplesect.para: A std::string containing the same data

briefdescription.para: Convert a std::string to a Dali::Property::Value of type STRING.

detaileddescription.para: This creates a Dali::String from the std::string and wraps it in a Property::Value. For internal use where the implementation needs to produce Property::Value from std::string.

simplesect.para: A Property::Value containing the string data

briefdescription.para: Add a std::string to a Property::Array.

detaileddescription.para: Wraps the recurring array.Add(ToDaliStringView(str)) pattern.

simplesect.para: A reference to the array

briefdescription.para: Add string key, string value pair to a Property::Map.

detaileddescription.para:
This converts the key and the value to a String type, and adds them to the map.
map
The map to modify.
key
The string key to use
value
The string to use as a value
A reference to the map

briefdescription.para: Add string key, string value pair to a Property::Map.

detaileddescription.para:
This converts the key and the value to a String type, and adds them to the map.
map
The map to modify.
key
The string key to use
value
The string to use as a value
A reference to the map

briefdescription.para: Add string_view key, string value pair to a Property::Map.

detaileddescription.para: Overload for std::string_view keys. Useful when keys are compile-time constants or std::string_view variables.

parameterdescription.para: The string to use as a value

simplesect.para: A reference to the map

briefdescription.para: Add string_view key, Property::Value pair to a Property::Map.

detaileddescription.para: Overload for std::string_view keys. Useful when keys are compile-time constants or std::string_view variables.

simplesect.para: A reference to the map

briefdescription.para: Convert a Dali::StringView to a std::string_view.

detaileddescription.para: This is a lightweight operation that creates a view over the same data without copying.

simplesect.para: A std::string_view over the same data

briefdescription.para: Convert a Dali::String to a std::string_view.

detaileddescription.para: This is a lightweight operation that creates a view over the String's data without copying.

simplesect.para: A std::string_view over the string's data

briefdescription.para: Create a Dali::StringView from a std::string.

detaileddescription.para: This is a lightweight operation that creates a view over the std::string's data without copying.

simplesect.para: A Dali::StringView over the string's data

briefdescription.para: Create a Dali::StringView from a std::string_view.

detaileddescription.para: This is a lightweight operation that creates a view over the same data without copying.

simplesect.para: A Dali::StringView over the same data

briefdescription.para: Convert a std::string to a Dali::String.

detaileddescription.para: This creates a copy of the string data.

simplesect.para: A Dali::String containing the same data

briefdescription.para: Convert a std::string_view to a Dali::String.

detaileddescription.para: This creates a copy of the viewed data.

simplesect.para: A Dali::String containing the same data

briefdescription.para: Copy a Dali::String (no-op conversion for convenience).

detaileddescription.para: This is a convenience overload that allows code to work with Dali::String without checking if conversion is needed.

simplesect.para: A copy of the Dali::String

briefdescription.para: Create new Dali::Texture with resourceId that Graphics::Controller can use.

parameterdescription.para: The unique id of this texture combinded with Graphics::Controller.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Texture

briefdescription.para: Get the resource id for this texture.

parameterdescription.para: The texture to get resource id.

simplesect.para: The resource id what given texture has.

briefdescription.para: Get the type for this texture.

parameterdescription.para: The texture to get texture type.

simplesect.para: The texture type what given texture has.

briefdescription.para: Set the size of texture.

parameterdescription.para: The width of texture to set.
The height of texture to set.

briefdescription.para: Set the pixel format of texture.

parameterdescription.para: The format of texture to set.

memberdef.argsstring: (Dali::Texture texture, Dali::PixelData pixelData, Dali::String context, TextureContextTypeHint::Type typeHint=TextureContextTypeHint::UNKNOWN)
memberdef.name: TextureUploadWithContent

briefdescription.para: Uploads data to the texture from a PixelData object, include context informations for profiling.

simplesect.para: If texture is native or fast track case, we don't actual upload. Just update the context. In that case, pixelData only be used for get BytesPerPixel value.

parameterdescription.para: The texture to upload data to.
The context of the uploaded data
Specifies hint for the texture which kind of image uploaded (optional)

simplesect.para: True if the PixelData object has compatible pixel format and fits within the texture, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: < for uint32_t
